CustomField.description: This field is used for the actual MR calculation. By default, it copies the Calculated FH:FC ratio unless an override or an Assumed Ratio is applied. When either is applicable, the Effective Ratio captures that value and uses it for the MR calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field is used for the actual MR calculation. By default, it copies the Calculated FH:FC ratio unless an override or an Assumed Ratio is applied. When either is applicable, the Effective Ratio captures that value and uses it for the MR calculation.
CustomField.label: Effective FH:FC Ratio
